Short CV

Pınar Demir Asma was born in Soma in 1994. After completing her primary and secondary education in Soma, she enrolled in Izmir Anatolian Teachers' High School in Çiğli district of Izmir for high school education in 2008. After 4 years of high school education, Demir enrolled in the Department of Child Development at Okan University in 2013 with a full ÖSYM scholarship and started to study in the Department of Psychology through the university's double major program in 2016. In 2018, she graduated from Okan University Faculty of Health Sciences with first place (GPA: 3.85/4) and from the Department of Psychology with high honors (GPA: 3.98/4). She graduated from Kocaeli University, Mental Rehabilitation Master's Program in 2020; Bolu Abant İzzet Baysal University Psychology Department PhD program in 2024. Demir worked as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Child Development between 2018 and 2024; currently, she continues her studies as a doctoral faculty member in the same department.
